subject: GitHub Actions pnpm setup
fact: When a GitHub Actions workflow uses actions/setup-node@v6 with pnpm, install pnpm explicitly first (for example with pnpm/action-setup@v4) instead of requesting pnpm cache setup from actions/setup-node before pnpm exists on PATH.
reason: This prevents the runner error 'Unable to locate executable file: pnpm' and is a reusable workflow pattern for future CI/CD edits in this repository.
